placements.justification: Fixed wall bench along north wall with front clearance
Anti-vibration table placed with required clearance from other equipment
Central location on bench with clearance for operation
Positioned for use with heating equipment

recommendations: Remaining small movable equipment (beakers, flasks, glassware, safety equipment) should be stored in wall cabinets or on mobile carts. Limited bench space requires careful equipment rotation during experiment workflow. Consider adding wall-mounted storage for frequently used items like safety goggles, lab coats, and small glassware.
